title: Health check returns 200 when all critical subsystems are operational
preconditions: All critical subsystems (database, AI API client, notification service) are running and reachable.
The infra module HTTP server is running via Docker Compose.
steps: Send a GET request to the health check endpoint.
Observe the HTTP response status code.
Parse the response body as JSON.
Verify that each critical subsystem is represented as a key in the response.
Verify that every subsystem reports an operational status.
expected_result: The endpoint returns HTTP 200 and a JSON body containing a status entry for each critical subsystem, each reporting an operational state.

title: Health check reports degraded status when the database is unreachable
preconditions: The infra module HTTP server is running.
The PostgreSQL database container has been stopped to simulate a failure.
steps: Send a GET request to the health check endpoint.
Observe the HTTP response status code.
Parse the response body as JSON.
Inspect the status field for the database subsystem.
expected_result: The endpoint returns a non-200 status code (e.g. 503 Service Unavailable) and the JSON body includes the database subsystem with a non-operational status, while other subsystem entries remain present.

title: Health check response includes all required critical subsystem keys
preconditions: All critical subsystems are running and reachable.
The infra module HTTP server is running via Docker Compose.
steps: Send a GET request to the health check endpoint.
Parse the response body as JSON.
Enumerate the subsystem keys present in the response.
Verify that at minimum the database, AI API client, and notification service keys are all present.
expected_result: The JSON response body contains at least the database, AI API client, and notification service subsystem keys. No critical subsystem is silently omitted from the report.

title: Health check reports degraded status when the AI API client is unreachable
preconditions: The infra module HTTP server is running.
The AI API client is configured to point to an unreachable address to simulate a failure.
The database and notification service are running normally.
steps: Send a GET request to the health check endpoint.
Observe the HTTP response status code.
Parse the response body as JSON.
Inspect the status field for the AI API client subsystem.
Inspect the status fields for the other subsystems.
expected_result: The endpoint returns a non-200 status code and the JSON body shows the AI API client subsystem as non-operational while the database and notification service subsystems report operational status.
